snippet.description:

#uskrsnjajaja #farbanjejaja #Easter

serpica recepti

Na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/farbanje-jaja-za-uskrs-sa-step-sokom.html

DEKUPA≈љ - SA SALVETAMA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RYcPeUa01YA

FARBANJE JAJA U LUKOVINI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7QSARBHTw-c
***********************************************************************
Kupite pra≈°kasti sok od jagode (ili rum punƒНa, maline), pomorandze i ako uspete pronaƒЗi jo≈° koju boju (step sok od limete) bilo bi odliƒНno.

Jedna kesica (10 gr.) je dovoljna za 10 komada jaja.

Jaja operite i mokrim sunƒСerom skinite peƒНat ako ima.

Stavite jaja u ≈°erpicu, nalijte vodu da prekrije, dodajte pola ka≈°iƒНice soli.

Kuvajte deset minuta. Sklonite sa ringle i odmah, u vrelo dodajte step sok koji ≈Њelite. Ni≈°ta ne me≈°ajte, sok ƒЗe se sam rastopiti.

Ostavite tako 15 minuta. Za ne≈Њniju boju, rozu jaja dr≈Њite kraƒЗe u soku.

Istresite teƒНnost i jaja stavite na radnu povr≈°inu da se osu≈°e, par minuta. Za mat izgled jaja ostavite takva kakva jesu ili ih prema≈Њite uljem da dobiju sjaj.

≈†to se tiƒНe ≈Њutih jaja koja se dobije od step soka od pomorand≈Њe, jaja je najbolje predhodno izbeliti u sirƒЗetu i vodi, postupak za izbeljivanje je ovde: https://youtu.be/rffoDA9kHW4  mada sam pokazala i u ovom videu sa step sokom.

localized.title: Ne≈°to novo i prelepo! Farbanje jaja za Uskrs sa step sokovima za ƒНas! Easter eggs.
localized.description:
Farbanje uskr≈°njih jaja na ovaj naƒНin je fantazija, lako, brzo, prelepo. Boje mogu biti pastelne, ne≈Њne a mogu i intezivnije. Kako ko voli. Ja volim da ima i jednih i drugih, mada ove ne≈Њnije su mi dra≈Њe.
#uskrsnjajaja #farbanjejaja #Easter
bojenje jaja
jaja za uskrs
novo
serpica recepti
serpica uskr≈°nja jaja

Na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/farbanje-jaja-za-uskrs-sa-step-sokom.html

DEKUPA≈љ - SA SALVETAMA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RYcPeUa01YA

JAJA NA PARI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=go92uwCASi4

SVETLUCAVA JAJA U VINU: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i_m8kWH8gIg

FARBANJE JAJA U LUKOVINI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7QSARBHTw-c
***********************************************************************
Kupite pra≈°kasti sok od jagode (ili rum punƒНa, maline), pomorandze i ako uspete pronaƒЗi jo≈° koju boju (step sok od limete) bilo bi odliƒНno.

Jedna kesica (10 gr.) je dovoljna za 10 komada jaja.

Jaja operite i mokrim sunƒСerom skinite peƒНat ako ima.

Stavite jaja u ≈°erpicu, nalijte vodu da prekrije, dodajte pola ka≈°iƒНice soli.

Kuvajte deset minuta. Sklonite sa ringle i odmah, u vrelo dodajte step sok koji ≈Њelite. Ni≈°ta ne me≈°ajte, sok ƒЗe se sam rastopiti.

Ostavite tako 15 minuta. Za ne≈Њniju boju, rozu jaja dr≈Њite kraƒЗe u soku.

Istresite teƒНnost i jaja stavite na radnu povr≈°inu da se osu≈°e, par minuta. Za mat izgled jaja ostavite takva kakva jesu ili ih prema≈Њite uljem da dobiju sjaj.

≈†to se tiƒНe ≈Њutih jaja koja se dobije od step soka od pomorand≈Њe, jaja je najbolje predhodno izbeliti u sirƒЗetu i vodi, postupak za izbeljivanje je ovde: https://youtu.be/rffoDA9kHW4  mada sam pokazala i u ovom videu sa step sokom.
Ako nemate step sok mo≈Њe bilo koji drugi.

de.title: BESSER ALS STRUDE - Magische Torte mit Mohn, Waln√Љssen und Marmelade
de.description:
Glauben Sie mir, sein Name ist nicht kostenlos "MAGIC PIE", es ist so lecker, dass es f√Љr mich besser ist als Strudel und ich liebe Strudel. Die Kombination von Mohn, Marmelade und Waln√Љssen in einem und gleichzeitig ist es auch mager. Ich bin mir sicher, sobald Sie diesen Kuchen gemacht haben, geht das Rezept an Ihre Favoriten und Sie werden es die ganze Zeit machen, auch wenn es nicht fastet. So feiner, leckerer und weicher Teig ohne Eier und Milch. Ich habe Pflaumenmarmelade verwendet, die perfekt zu dieser Kombination passt.
рЯФКDREHEN SIE DIE √ЬBERSETZUNG DURCH KOMPRESSIEREN IN DER RECHTEN ECKE CC

ZUTATENKUCHENZUTATEN
250 ml Kamillentee (ich habe Mango- und Pfirsichfruchttee verwendet)
150 ml √Цl
20 gr. Hefe (ein halber W√Љrfel)
3 Essl√ґffel Zucker,
Prise Salz
1 Beutel Vanillezucker,
geriebene Zitronenschale,
500 g Sentella Typ 500 Mehl f√Љr Brot und Kuchen
F√ЬR FIL:
300 gr. gemahlener Mohn,
3 Essl√ґffel Hagebutten- oder Aprikosenmarmelade,
3 Essl√ґffel Zucker, wenn die Strudelmischung keinen Zucker hinzuf√Љgt,
ein wenig hei√Яes Wasser.

el.title: ќЪќСќЫќ•ќ§ќХќ°ќЯ ќСќ†ќЯ ќСќЭќЯќЩќІќ§ќЯ - ќЬќ±ќ≥ќєќЇќЃ ѕАќѓѕДќ± ќЉќµ ѕГѕАѕМѕБќњѕЕѕВ ѕАќ±ѕАќ±ѕБќњѕНќљќ±ѕВ, ќЇќ±ѕБѕНќіќєќ± ќЇќ±ќє ќЉќ±ѕБќЉќµќїќђќіќ±
el.description:
ќ†ќєѕГѕДќ≠ѕИѕДќµ ќЉќµ, ѕДќњ ѕМќљќњќЉќђ ѕДќњѕЕ ќіќµќљ ќµќѓќљќ±ќє ќіѕЙѕБќµќђќљ "MAGIC PIE", ќµќѓќљќ±ќє ѕДѕМѕГќњ ќљѕМѕГѕДќєќЉќњ ѕАќњѕЕ ќµќѓќљќ±ќє ќЇќ±ќїѕНѕДќµѕБќњ ќ≥ќєќ± ќЉќ≠ќљќ± ќ±ѕАѕМ ѕДќњ strudel ќЇќ±ќє ќїќ±ѕДѕБќµѕНѕЙ ѕДќњ strudel. ќЯ ѕГѕЕќљќіѕЕќ±ѕГќЉѕМѕВ ѕДѕЙќљ ѕГѕАѕМѕБѕЙќљ ѕАќ±ѕАќ±ѕБќњѕНќљќ±ѕВ, ѕДќЈѕВ ќЉќ±ѕБќЉќµќїќђќіќ±ѕВ ќЇќ±ќє ѕДѕЙќљ ќЇќ±ѕБѕЕќіќєѕОќљ ѕГќµ ќ≠ќљќ±ќљ ќЇќ±ќє ѕДќ±ѕЕѕДѕМѕЗѕБќњќљќ± ќµќѓќљќ±ќє ќїќєѕДѕМѕВ. ќХќѓќЉќ±ќє ќ≤ќ≠ќ≤ќ±ќєќњѕВ ѕМѕДќє ќЉѕМќїќєѕВ ѕЖѕДќєќђќЊќµѕДќµ ќ±ѕЕѕДѕМ ѕДќњ ќЇќ≠ќєќЇ, ќЈ ѕГѕЕќљѕДќ±ќ≥ќЃ ѕАќЈќ≥ќ±ќѓќљќµќє ѕГѕДќ± ќ±ќ≥ќ±ѕАќЈќЉќ≠ќљќ± ѕГќ±ѕВ ќЇќ±ќє ќЄќ± ѕДќњ ѕЖѕДќєќђѕЗќљќµѕДќµ ѕГѕЕќљќµѕЗѕОѕВ ќ±ќЇѕМќЉќ± ќЇќ±ќє ѕМѕДќ±ќљ ќіќµќљ ќµќѓќљќ±ќє ќљќЈѕГѕДќµќѓќ±. ќ§ѕМѕГќњ ѕЙѕБќ±ќѓќ±, ќљѕМѕГѕДќєќЉќЈ ќЇќ±ќє ќЉќ±ќїќ±ќЇќЃ ќґѕНќЉќЈ ѕЗѕЙѕБќѓѕВ ќ±ѕЕќ≥ќђ ќЇќ±ќє ќ≥ќђќїќ±. ќІѕБќЈѕГќєќЉќњѕАќњќѓќЈѕГќ± ќЉќ±ѕБќЉќµќїќђќіќ± ќіќ±ќЉќђѕГќЇќЈќљќњѕЕ ѕАќњѕЕ ѕДќ±ќєѕБќєќђќґќµќє ѕДќ≠ќїќµќєќ± ќЉќµ ќ±ѕЕѕДѕМќљ ѕДќњќљ ѕГѕЕќљќіѕЕќ±ѕГќЉѕМ

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO sa RR - BAKA PRASE : TERETE ME JER SAM MNOGO JAKA GLAVA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Bogdan Ilic, poznatiji kao, Baka Prase! Kako je poceo da snima, kakve probleme donosi popularnost, o dramama i hapsenju, pricace sa mnom u danasnjoj epizodi!
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Milorad TomiƒЗ - Lo≈°e je pro≈°ao svako ko nije ƒЗutao i trpeo Velju Nevolju! (24.3.2021)
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Intervju" bio je Milorad TomiƒЗ To≈°a, ƒНovek koji je prkosio momcima s vrelog asfalta. Kao mladiƒЗ koji se bavio sportom poƒНeo je da radi na ulazima klubova i tako je upoznao mnoge, gotovo sve, poznate ≈Њestoke momke. Svoj posao je obavljao profesionalno bez izuzetka, ne dozvoljavajuƒЗi ikome da kr≈°i pravila lokala. Tamo gde je on radio ni najpoznatiji ≈Њestoki momci nisu mogli da prave haos. To ga je dovodilo u te≈°ke, a nekada i po ≈Њivot opasne situacije. Ipak, tvrdi da ga nikada nije zanimalo ko je ko od tih ljudi, veƒЗ samo da li naru≈°avaju red u objektu. I momci kao ≈°to su Arkan, Zlatko BagariƒЗ, Mihajlo Divac i ostali nailazili su na otpor kada bi se pona≈°ali neprikladno. Osim u klubovima, To≈°a je jedno vreme bio telohranitelj Vojislava ≈†e≈°elja i iz tog vremena nosi veliki broj anegdota i uspomena. O svemu ovome govori u svojim knjigama, a i ekskluzivno za gledaoce BALKAN INFO produkcije otvoreno i po prvi put govori o svojoj pro≈°losti i raznim situacijama koje je do≈Њiveo. PreporuƒНujemo Vam da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate vi≈°e o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 12.03.2021. godine u na≈°im prostorijama, u Beogradu. Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar PavkoviƒЗ.

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i ≈Њele da pomognu rad na≈°e produkcije to mogu uƒНiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. TrudiƒЗemo se da ostanemo dosledni na≈°oj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i ≈°irenju istine bez cenzure.

BALKAN INFO je nezavisna medijska produkcija osnovana u junu 2015. godine u Beogradu. Prepoznati smo kao glas svih koji ne ≈Њele da budu deo kratkotrajnih projekata i saveza, svih onih koji po≈°tuju srpske tradicionalne vrednosti i koji ƒНuvaju seƒЗanje na na≈°e slavne pretke.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рЯСА


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter вЦЇ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram вЦЇhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook вЦЇhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

ParentвАЩs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: Stuck at sea: Cargo ship wedged in Suez Canal causes traffic jam
snippet.description:
Tug boats and a digger are struggling to free a mega cargo ship, blocking one of the world's busiest shipping pathways.

Dozens of ships are stuck because a container ship almost half a kilometre long is wedged across the waterway.

Listen to the Sky News Daily podcast on the impact of the cargo ship's blockage of the Suez Canal - https://news.sky.com/story/wedged-in-the-suez-how-a-mega-ship-brought-the-canal-to-a-standstill-12261097

snippet.title: Emanet 149. B√ґl√Љm Fragmanƒ± | Legacy Episode 149 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. snippet.title: Emanet 147. B√ґl√Љm Fragmanƒ± | Legacy Episode 147 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Biden seems confused at times during first official press conference | New York Post
snippet.description:
President Biden appeared to repeatedly lose his train of thought early on in his first press conference as commander-in-chief Thursday, asking reporters if they wanted him to go into detail in his answers, forgetting questions and relying heavily on cue cards from a binder he brought along.

The president took ten questions at the 62 minute presser, repeatedly consulting his binder before calling on the next reporter.

The three-ring binder also held the opening remarks he delivered at the start of the briefing, as well as notes on topics of major concern he was likely to be asked about.

The first awkward moment occurred while the president was answering a question on the crisis at the southern border from PBS journalist Yamiche Alcindor.

#JoeBiden #PressConference

http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/banana-keksici-post-na-vodi.html

Sastojci:
- 300 gr. bra≈°na
- 2 banane
- 3 ka≈°ike d≈Њema
- 100 gr. ≈°eƒЗera u prahu
- vanila
- limunova korica
- prstohvat soli
- 10 gr. pra≈°ka za pecivo

Za premaz:
- 1 ka≈°ika d≈Њema
- 2 ka≈°ike vode

*200 stepeni oko 20 minuta

 ENG:
Ingredients:
- 300 gr. flour
- 2 bananas
- 3 tablespoons of jam
- 100 gr. powdered sugar
- vanilla
- lemon zest
- pinch of salt
- 10 gr. baking powder

For coating:
- 1 tablespoon of jam
- 2 tablespoons of water

* 200 degrees for about 20 minutes

snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaвАЛвАЛ

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances.

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвАЛвАЛ...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagramвАЛвАЛ
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookвАЛвАЛ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialвАЛвАЛ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterвАЛвАЛ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeвАЛвАЛ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвАЛ #FutureNostalgiaвАЛ #Grammys

snippet.title: Joe Biden stumbles on steps of Air Force One
snippet.description:
The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!

ItвАЩs Saturday morning, so you know what time it isвА¶ Time for another Mat vs Yianni showdown!! 

WeвАЩve got a BMW X6M Competition going up against a Lamborghini Urus (no prizes for guessing whoвАЩs in which car)! These two SUV heavyweights are going head-to-head over the quarter-mile, and when looking at stats alone, you might think itвАЩll be an easy win for the Urus! 

Under the LamboвАЩs bonnet, youвАЩll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But thatвАЩs not allвА¶ The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M! 

Now, of course, we know the BMW has one trick up its sleeve - an EPIC launch system! The question is, will it be enough to snatch the win on this wet track? ThereвАЩs only one way to find outвА¶ LETвАЩS RACE!

.............................................................

snippet.description:
DAVID RADOSAVLJEVIC x DRIA - DIOR

Tekst: Neven IN VIVO

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Sa tobom sve je rulet, od milke do nule,
Brze nego Tesla S, ej
Tako ti je sa princezama, voli kad je vezana,
Pssst, Samo niko da ne cuje.

Ele ele ele ele
Ko bi reko da je mala ziva vatra.
Ele ele
Njene misli koje skriva nocu gresnije od pakla.

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Mala moze casove da daje,
Kada igra opasna je,
I svi kazu aj jaj jaj jaj,

Nocas lepa je ko Raj,
Kukovima uvija,
I svi kazu samo aj jaj jaj
